actors.name: User
actors.description: General user interacting with the Berachain ecosystem.
capabilities: Stake receipt tokens in Reward Vaults

actors.name: Validator
actors.description: Node operator participating in consensus, block production, and PoL.

actors.name: Guardian
actors.description: Elected signer in a multisig responsible for cancelling malicious governance proposals.
capabilities: Cancel malicious proposals during timelock period via multisig

actors.name: Protocol/dApp Developer
actors.description: Entity building applications or integrating with Berachain.
capabilities: Offer incentive tokens in Reward Vaults

actors.name: $BGT Holder
actors.description: User holding $BGT tokens, participating in governance and PoL.

actors.name: Liquidity Provider
actors.description: User providing liquidity to dApps like BEX.
capabilities: Stake receipt tokens in Reward Vaults

actors.name: Incentive Token Manager
actors.description: Wallet address responsible for offering and managing incentive tokens for a specific Reward Vault.
capabilities: Offer incentive tokens to a Reward Vault

actors.name: Berachain Foundation
actors.description: Organization supporting ecosystem development, R&D, and operations.

actors.name: BGT Foundation
actors.description: Entity involved in reviewing Reward Vault whitelisting proposals.
capabilities: Review Request for Reward Vault (RFRV) proposals

assets.name: $BERA Token
assets.description: Native gas and staking token of Berachain.

assets.name: $BGT Token
assets.description: Non-transferrable governance and PoL reward token.

assets.name: $HONEY Token
assets.description: Native, fully collateralized stablecoin of Berachain.

assets.name: Receipt Tokens
assets.description: Tokens representing a user's share in a liquidity pool or other staked position (e.g., LP tokens).

assets.name: Incentive Tokens
assets.description: Whitelisted ERC20 tokens offered by protocols to validators/boosters (e.g., $USDC).

assets.name: Private Keys
assets.description: Cryptographic keys granting access to a user's wallet and assets.

assets.name: Governance Proposal
assets.description: Data structure representing a proposed change to the Berachain protocol or dApps.

assets.name: Airdrop Allocation
assets.description: Data indicating a user's entitlement to $BERA tokens from an airdrop.

assets.name: Validator $BERA Stake
assets.description: $BERA tokens staked by validators to participate in consensus.

assets.name: $BGT Delegation (Boost)
assets.description: $BGT tokens delegated by holders to validators to influence their reward emissions.

assets.name: User Wallet Address
assets.description: Public identifier for a user's account on the blockchain.

assets.name: Transaction Data
assets.description: Record of an operation executed on the blockchain.

assets.name: Block Data
assets.description: A collection of confirmed transactions bundled together.

assets.name: $WBERA Token
assets.description: Wrapped BERA token (0x6969696969696969696969696969696969696969), used in specific DeFi interactions like FeeCollector.

components.name: User Wallet
components.description: Client-side application (e.g., MetaMask) for managing keys and interacting with dApps.

components.name: Berachain L1 Network
components.description: The core Berachain Layer 1 blockchain, including EVM, consensus (PoL, BeaconKit, CometBFT).

components.name: Airdrop Checker dApp
components.description: Web application (checker.berachain.com) for users to check their airdrop allocations.

components.name: Airdrop Claim dApp
components.description: Web application (airdrop.berachain.com) for users to claim their $BERA airdrop.

components.name: Governance System
components.description: On-chain smart contracts and off-chain processes (forum discussions, RFRV) for protocol governance.

components.name: Guardian Multisig
components.description: A 5-of-9 multisig contract controlled by Guardians to cancel malicious governance proposals.

components.name: BeraHub dApp
components.description: Central web application (hub.berachain.com) for managing $BGT, accessing BEX, validator interactions, and rewards.

components.name: Berachain NFT Bridge
components.description: Service (nftbridge.berachain.com) to transfer official Berachain NFTs between Ethereum and Berachain.

components.name: Berachain Token Bridge
components.description: Service (bridge.berachain.com, powered by LayerZero) to transfer tokens between Berachain and other blockchains.

components.name: Reward Vault Contract
components.description: Smart contract where users stake PoL-eligible assets (receipt tokens) to earn $BGT rewards.

components.name: BEX dApp
components.description: Berachain's native decentralized exchange (DEX) for token swapping and liquidity provision.

components.name: Honey Swap dApp
components.description: Web application (honey.berachain.com) for minting, burning, and swapping $HONEY.

components.name: HoneyFactory Contract
components.description: Core smart contract responsible for minting new $HONEY tokens against deposited collateral.

components.name: $HONEY Collateral Vault Contract
components.description: Specialized smart contracts, one for each type of whitelisted collateral, holding assets backing $HONEY.

components.name: Distributor Contract
components.description: Smart contract that distributes $BGT emissions from validators to the designated Reward Vaults.

components.name: BGTIncentiveDistributor Contract
components.description: Smart contract that manages the distribution of protocol-provided incentives to $BGT holders who have boosted validators.

components.name: FeeCollector Contract
components.description: Smart contract that collects fees from core dApps (BEX, Honey Swap), auctions them for $WBERA, and distributes $WBERA to $BGT boosters.

components.name: Ethereum Mainnet
components.description: External public blockchain where Berachain NFTs originate.

components.name: Centralized Exchanges (CEX)
components.description: Third-party platforms for trading cryptocurrencies like $BERA.

components.name: RFRV Submission System
components.description: Off-chain forms (e.g., Google Forms) for submitting Reward Vault whitelisting requests.

components.name: Governance Forum
components.description: Off-chain platform (hub.forum.berachain.com) for community discussion on governance proposals.

components.name: BlockRewardController Contract
components.description: On-chain contract managing parameters for $BGT block reward emissions.

components.name: Auto-Incentivizer
components.description: System component that uses fees from foundation vaults to automatically offer incentives.

data_flows.data: Signed Transactions (e.g., token transfers, smart contract interactions, staking)
data_flows.description: User Wallet submits transactions to the Berachain L1 Network for execution.

data_flows.data: Blockchain State (e.g., account balances, transaction receipts, contract data)
data_flows.description: User Wallet reads state from the Berachain L1 Network.

data_flows.data: $BGT Emission Data (from block production by validators)
data_flows.description: Berachain L1 Network (PoL module) signals $BGT emissions to the Distributor Contract.
Distributor Contract sends $BGT rewards to whitelisted Reward Vaults based on validator allocations.
Reward Vaults forward captured incentive tokens (from protocols) to the BGTIncentiveDistributor for boosters.
HoneyFactory Contract deposits collateral into the appropriate $HONEY Collateral Vault during $HONEY minting.
$HONEY Collateral Vault confirms collateral deposit to HoneyFactory.
BEX dApp sends collected trading fees to the FeeCollector Contract.
Honey Swap dApp (via HoneyFactory) sends collected $HONEY mint/burn fees to the FeeCollector Contract.
Berachain NFT Bridge sends data to Ethereum Mainnet to facilitate the transfer of an NFT from Berachain to Ethereum.
Berachain NFT Bridge signals Berachain L1 Network to mint bridged NFT.
Governance System executes successful proposals, causing state changes on the Berachain L1 Network.

trust_boundaries.name: User Device Boundary
trust_boundaries.description: Separates the user's local environment (wallet) from external networks and dApps. Protects private keys.

trust_boundaries.name: Berachain L1 Network Boundary
trust_boundaries.description: Defines the core trusted execution environment of the Berachain blockchain. Protects integrity and availability of the ledger.

trust_boundaries.name: dApp Frontend to Backend/Blockchain Boundary
trust_boundaries.description: Separates potentially less trusted web frontends from the Berachain L1 and its smart contracts. User must verify transactions.

trust_boundaries.name: Cross-Chain Bridge Boundary
trust_boundaries.description: Separates Berachain from other blockchains (e.g., Ethereum) connected via bridges. Relies on bridge security.

trust_boundaries.name: Governance Timelock Boundary
trust_boundaries.description: Timelock period before proposal execution, allowing Guardian intervention. Protects against malicious proposals.

trust_boundaries.name: Off-chain to On-chain Governance Boundary
trust_boundaries.description: Separates off-chain discussion and submission processes from on-chain governance execution. Relies on manual verification and proposal creation integrity.

trust_boundaries.name: Berachain L1 to CEX Boundary
trust_boundaries.description: Separates the Berachain L1 Network from external Centralized Exchanges where $BERA can be traded. Relies on CEX security and off-chain processes.

behaviors.name: User Claims Airdrop
behaviors.description: User connects their wallet to the Airdrop Claim dApp and initiates a transaction to claim $BERA tokens.

behaviors.name: $BGT Holder Creates Governance Proposal
behaviors.description: $BGT Holder with sufficient $BGT submits a new governance proposal via BeraHub or directly to the Governance System.

behaviors.name: Guardian Cancels Proposal
behaviors.description: Guardians, via the Guardian Multisig, cancel a malicious governance proposal during its timelock period.

behaviors.name: Liquidity Provider Stakes LP Tokens
behaviors.description: Liquidity Provider stakes their receipt (LP) tokens into a Reward Vault contract to earn $BGT.

behaviors.name: User Boosts Validator
behaviors.description: User delegates their $BGT to a chosen validator through BeraHub to boost the validator's emissions and earn incentives.

behaviors.name: Validator Directs $BGT Emissions
behaviors.description: Validator configures their reward allocation to direct their $BGT emissions to specific Reward Vaults via the Distributor Contract.

behaviors.name: Protocol Offers Incentives
behaviors.description: An Incentive Token Manager adds incentive tokens to their Reward Vault to attract validator emissions.

behaviors.name: User Mints $HONEY
behaviors.description: User deposits whitelisted collateral into Honey Swap dApp (interacting with HoneyFactory) to mint $HONEY.

behaviors.name: User Bridges NFT
behaviors.description: User uses the Berachain NFT Bridge to transfer an official NFT from Ethereum Mainnet to Berachain.

behaviors.name: Validator Proposes Block
behaviors.description: An active validator, chosen based on $BERA stake, proposes a new block to the Berachain L1 Network.

behaviors.name: User Swaps Tokens on BEX
behaviors.description: User interacts with the BEX dApp to exchange one token for another.

behaviors.name: User Claims Incentives from Boosting
behaviors.description: User who boosted a validator claims their share of incentive tokens via BeraHub, interacting with BGTIncentiveDistributor.

behaviors.name: User Redeems $BGT for $BERA
behaviors.description: User uses BeraHub to redeem (burn) their $BGT for $BERA tokens at a 1:1 ratio.

behaviors.name: Validator Changes Incentive Commission Rate
behaviors.description: Validator queues and then activates a new commission percentage for incentives earned from $BGT emissions, after a waiting period.

behaviors.name: User Delegates $BGT Voting Power
behaviors.description: $BGT Holder delegates their governance voting power to another address.

behaviors.name: $HONEY Basket Mode Activates
behaviors.description: The $HONEY system (HoneyFactory) automatically activates Basket Mode when a collateral asset depegs, changing minting/redemption rules.
